programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for France
programme.desc: In Burgundy, Eva meets monks who are said to have invented French agriculture and the incredible craft of terroir half a millennia ago.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for France
programme.desc: Eva finds herself in Alsace, a frontier land, sitting between Germany and France, with a cuisine to match.
